{{Infobox character
| name = Caius Agnos
| introduced = City of Light
| name = Caius Agnos
| aliases = Caius
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Damascan trader, blacksmith
| introduced = City of Light
}}

''See also: [[Caius Agnos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius [[Agnos]] is a merchant and skilled craftsman who is part of the [[Agnos family]], which includes his wife Olissa and their two children, [[Lycus]] and Andra. Originally a trader of general supplies within the realms of [[Malachi]] and [[Deborah]], he had recently been granted land on a border to settle down. He is described as a friendly, balding man with a warm smile and a stout build, though he possesses significant muscular strength. While some perceived him as a soft individual who avoided strenuous labor, he is capable of intense physical work, such as blacksmithing and hauling heavy crates. In a [[workshop]] setting, he has been observed performing complex metalwork, including repairing or joining different types of [[steel]]. During a violent encounter with an [[Incarnation]], Caius demonstrated bravery by attempting to defend himself with a smith's hammer. He later sustained a severe wound to his right side that left him in a critical, semi-conscious state, requiring urgent medicinal intervention via a healing pool.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius stands at the edge of a ring of firelight with Olissa.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius is a person who carries large crates in the camp.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius is a person in the wagon with a great dark stain on his right side.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Caius was carried into [[Valinhall]] by Olissa and [[Lycus]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Caius is [[Lycus]] and Andra's father.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Caius is a [[Damascan]] trader.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Caius Agnos]] is Olissa's husband and a blacksmith.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius is the husband of [[Olissa Agnos]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius was holding onto a table to catch his breath.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Caius was present in [[Simon]]'s bedroom.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
